basics.name: Alex Mercer
basics.headline: Senior product-minded software engineer
headlines: Technical Director - Games, VR, AI Systems
basics.summary: Engineer with a bias toward shipping clean user-facing systems, building internal tooling, and translating ambiguous requirements into maintainable products.

roles.title: Lead Full-Stack Engineer
roles.summary: Owned product architecture, hiring loops, and hands-on delivery for a document-heavy internal platform.
bullets: Designed and shipped a browser-based operations suite used across finance, support, and product teams.
Led a three-engineer delivery stream while still owning core architecture decisions and high-risk implementation work.
Reduced turnaround on internal requests by building self-serve workflow tooling and print-ready document generators.

roles.title: Senior Backend Engineer
roles.summary: Built APIs, data pipelines, and deployment automation for a transaction-heavy B2B platform.
bullets: Implemented Python services and scheduling workflows for data ingestion, billing, and analytics.
Hardened service interfaces, observability, and deployment scripts for a growing production environment.
Partnered with product leadership to scope milestone delivery and prioritize technical debt.
roles.impact: Supported a 2x growth period without service regressions.

projects.name: Tailored Document Generator
projects.summary: A schema-driven generator for turning structured data into polished printable documents.
bullets: Separated template structure from source data so layouts could evolve independently from content.
Implemented strict JSON validation and deterministic rendering to reduce formatting regressions.
Designed the system so generated output stayed printable and editable before export.
projects.impact: Cut repeated manual document work down to minutes.

achievements.title: Built a practical engineering interview loop
achievements.summary: Created an interview process that improved signal without overburdening candidates.
bullets: Introduced role-relevant take-home evaluation and structured scoring rubrics.
Aligned hiring feedback with actual team delivery needs.

education.details: Coursework focused on algorithms, distributed systems, and software engineering.
bullets: Graduated with a thesis on workflow optimization for distributed systems.

certifications.name: Cloud Architecture Foundations
certifications.details: Focused on systems design tradeoffs, resiliency patterns, and secure deployment habits.
bullets: Applied training to improve deployment and rollback planning.
